onboardingEmptyState.description: {brandName} turns your spec into working software — built and reviewed live on a map. Vivi sets up your project to begin.

open.title: Open an existing project
open.description: Point {brandName} at a repository already on disk.

scaffold.title: Start a new project
scaffold.description: Name it and {brandName} scaffolds a lean method skeleton.

import.title: Import documents
import.description: Bring the spec docs you already have — {brandName} stores them and prepares them when the pipeline runs.

openProjectDialog.title: Open project
openProjectDialog.description: Choose the local repository {brandName} should develop. Navigate to the folder and select it.

toast.selectedNoSpec: {root} (no docs/ — extract has no spec to read yet)

toast.successDescription: {root} — write your canonical docs, then extract.

importDocsDialog.title: Import your docs
importDocsDialog.description: Add the spec docs you already have. {brandName} stores them under .vivicy/uploads/ in the folder you choose and prepares them when the pipeline runs — nothing is rewritten, nothing is overwritten.

step2.label: Choose the working folder
step2.hint: Pick an empty folder, an existing repository, or create a new one — {brandName} will govern it.
step2.lockedHint: Add at least one document above to choose where it lands.

dropzone.prompt: Drag files, a folder, or a .zip here

selected.accepted: {count, plural, one {# document} other {# documents}} ready
selected.rejected: {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}} skipped

toast.importedCount: {count, plural, one {# document} other {# documents}} imported.
toast.importedSkipped: {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}} skipped as unsupported.
toast.folderReadErrorTitle: Could not read the dropped folder
toast.folderReadErrorDescription: This browser can't read folder contents from a drop. Drop the files directly, or add them with Choose files.
